prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-AOTAC-BUN-2PC-12PK-3B1-BLCK Product Type: HARDWARE_CLAMP_VISE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 24pk ASR Outdoor 3 1/4 Inch x 1 Inch Camping Tarp Secure Grip Awning Clamps Description: The ASR Outdoor Awning Clamps will come in handy whether you're hiking, camping, or improving your home. They feature a secure grip with ridges to lock in place, and will adjust to various thicknesses.

These clamps are great for holding down tarps, whether you're camping out or constructing a temporary waterproof cover. They will attach to the edge of the tarp to provide an extra tying option.

They measure in at 3 1/4" long and 1" wide, and have a black durable plastic body. Make sure to take them with you wherever you need to use a tarp.

Note: Awning clamps come in packs of 24. Search Terms: heavy duty slide lock clamp tarp locking awning hook tie down automotive hook accessory for on the go camping RV road trip across the USA Features: - Dimensions: 3 1/4 inch x 1 inch - Color: Black - Durable Plastic Body - Great for Holding Down Tarps - Attach to Edge of Tarp | Provide Extra Tying Option === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 24-pk 3.25in x 1in Black Tarp Clamps

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 24-Pk 3 1/4 In Black Awning Clamps

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Secure Grip, Adjustable Thickness, Durable Plastic, Camping And RV Ready

openai.title_differentiation: Secure Grip Ridges, Adjustable To Various Thicknesses, Durable Plastic Body, Tarp And Awning Tie Down
